description.overview: The original Schnauzer, Standards are versatile, intelligent dogs. They're spirited but reliable, making excellent family companions and watchdogs.
description.history: The Standard Schnauzer originated in Germany.
description.temperament: Known for being fearless, smart, spirited.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense, wiry, harsh coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The original Schnauzer, Standards are versatile, intelligent dogs. They're spirited but reliable, making excellent family companions and watchdogs.
